differential_diagnoses: Dabrafenib and trametinib-induced systemic adverse reaction (pyrexia/hepatotoxicity)
Systemic inflammatory response syndrome due to occult biliary pathology
Metastatic melanoma progression with systemic inflammatory symptoms
next_steps: Perform ferritin, soluble IL-2 receptor, and triglyceride levels to screen for HLH
Obtain peripheral blood smear to look for morulae and evaluate for hemolysis
Discontinue dabrafenib and trametinib permanently given recurrent severe systemic symptoms
Perform magnetic resonance cholangiopancreatography (MRCP) to further evaluate biliary/hepatic etiology
Check ANA, ASMA, and IgG levels to evaluate for autoimmune hepatitis
Perform infectious disease consultation for consideration of PCR testing for tickborne pathogens
